Kingdom Attack

Kingdom Attack offers a fascinating game world where many different creatures live. Employ spirited knights, witches and archers in your army. Upgrade your towers to their most potent. Then, get ready to defend your kingdom from zombies, dragons, and other shapeless creatures on the battlefield.

Play Kingdom Attack Online

Loading game...
About Kingdom Attack

Kingdom Attack offers a fascinating game world where many different creatures live. Employ spirited knights, witches and archers in your army. Upgrade your towers to their most potent. Then, get ready to defend your kingdom from zombies, dragons, and other shapeless creatures on the battlefield. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Kingdom Attack in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Simulator game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Kingdom Attack for free?

Yes. Kingdom Attack is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Kingdom Attack?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
